title: The Last Journey
overview: The long-standing friendship between Finn and Jacob is wearing thin, and when Finn squanders both their fortunes on yet another financial scam, Jacob has had enough. He leaves his friend, plunging Finn into a deep personal crisis. By chance, they are reunited in Sweden, where Jacob has made a new life for himself. The pair try to patch things up, but it turns out that they both have hidden agendas.
